variants: Mansur Tezcan currently resides in Cranesage Terrace, where he continues his journey in the agricultural sector. He works diligently at Meadowrun Farms, fully applying the skills and knowledge he acquired during his time at the Hollowreed Institute. His professional language is the Georgian alphabet, a testament to his cultural heritage, which is deeply rooted in his upbringing at Jasperpine Farm, his birthplace. Through his work, Mansur connects with his passion for farming while contributing to his community and sustaining a rich cultural narrative.
